parameters.name: type
parameters.label: Type
parameters.description: Select limit options such as loop, clamp, or zigzag from the menu. The value will remain in the range from Min to less than Max.

parameters.name: min
parameters.label: Minimum
parameters.description: The minimum value the output channel can have.

parameters.name: max
parameters.label: Maximum
parameters.description: The maximum value the output channel can have.

parameters.name: positive
parameters.label: Positive Only
parameters.description: Takes the absolute value of the channel, making all negative values positive.

parameters.name: norm
parameters.label: Normalize
parameters.description: Scale and offset the channel so that it lies between -1 and +1. The Normalize function does not work with on.

parameters.name: underflow
parameters.label: Fix Underflows
parameters.description: This will cause extremely tiny numbers to be rounded to 0.

parameters.name: quantvalue
parameters.label: Quantize Value
parameters.description: Selects the quantization method to use:

parameters.name: voffset
parameters.label: Value Offset
parameters.description: The offset for quantized values, to allow steps to not lie at zero, the default.

parameters.name: quantindex
parameters.label: Quantize Index
parameters.description: Selects whether to quantize the index relative to the sample 0, or the start index of the .

parameters.name: istep
parameters.label: Step
parameters.description: The increment between quantized indices, in seconds, frames or samples.

parameters.name: timeslice
parameters.label: Time Slice
parameters.description: Turning this on forces the channels to be " ".  A is the time between the last cook frame and the current cook frame.

parameters.name: scope
parameters.label: Scope
parameters.description: To determine which channels get affected, some CHOPs use a string on the Common page. See .

parameters.name: srselect
parameters.label: Sample Rate Match
parameters.description: Handle cases where multiple input CHOPs' sample rates are different. When Resampling occurs, the curves are interpolated according to the Interpolation Method Option, or "Linear" if the Interpolate Op

parameters.name: exportmethod
parameters.label: Export Method
parameters.description: This will determine how to connect the channel to the parameter. Refer to the article for more information.

parameters.name: autoexportroot
parameters.label: Export Root
parameters.description: This path points to the root node where all of the paths that exporting by are relative to.

parameters.name: exporttable
parameters.label: Export Table
parameters.description: The used to hold the export information when using the Table Methods (See above).
